Application.title: Internship Application
Application.description: Details of an intern's application for a role.

fullName.description: The full name of the applicant.

email.description: The email address of the applicant.

portfolioUrl.description: A link to the applicant's portfolio or work.

linkedinUrl.description: A link to the applicant's LinkedIn profile.

nationBuilding.description: The applicant's thoughts on nation building in the context of a Developed India.

whySvamarga.description: The applicant's motivation for joining Svamarga.

roleId.description: The ID of the role they are applying for.

roleTitle.description: The title of the role they are applying for.

status.description: The current status of the application.
